title: College career path ‘over’ as skilled trade get 30% pay bump, recruitment giant says
summary_full: "I would say you can make a good career and good money in skilled trade. That's definitely a career track," CEO of world's largest recruitment firm told CNBC.
summary_public: "I would say you can make a good career and good money in skilled trade. That's definitely a career track," CEO of world's largest recruitment firm told CNBC.
